tableName.title: Table Name
tableName.description: The target ClickHouse table name for INSERT

batchSize.title: Batch Size
batchSize.description: Maximum number of rows to buffer before flushing (default: 10000)

batchFlushIntervalMs.title: Batch Flush Interval (ms)
batchFlushIntervalMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait before flushing a batch (default: 1000)
